name: Quilted Fabric Cube Storage Bin - Blue - Cloud Island™: Polyester Square Baskets with Cardboard Structure
description:
Keep your little one's room clutter-free with this Quilted Fabric Cube Storage Bin from cloud island™. This decorative cube storage bin features a light-blue quilted fabric construction with wavy texture for fun style. Designed with attached handles for easy portability, this square-shaped storage basket is great for stowing toys, blankets and other items. Plus, it can be spot cleaned for easy care.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
